---
name: Lesson candidate
about: Share a reusable experience or pattern that future agents should not rediscover from scratch.
title: "[Lesson] "
---

## Summary

State the reusable lesson in one or two sentences.

## What Was Learned

What pattern, failure mode, or useful rule did you discover?

## Evidence

Where did this lesson come from?

- one or more job names
- benchmark references
- review findings
- previews
- execution records

## Why You Believe This Is Reusable

Explain why this is more than a one-off observation.

## Detection Rule

How should a future agent notice this problem earlier next time?

## Recommended Reusable Rule

What should a future agent do differently because of this lesson?

## Suspected Owner Layer

Which layer should absorb this lesson?

- `plannerskills`
- `drawskills`
- `visioskills`
- `learningskills`
- `Setup`
- `docs/contracts`
- `mixed`

## Promotion Path

Should this become:

- a lesson document under `agent/skills/learningskills/lessons/`
- a proposal first
- a direct shared repo change
